title: EpisodeTranscript
description: SPEC 11.8 EpisodeTranscript (FR-032 / AD-022 / AC-034, added 2026-07-12). One record per eval episode a full check_evals run persists under --transcripts-dir; never committed to the repo. The ordered tool_calls plus the verbatim submitted payload (possibly schema-invalid) make OQ-016 failures diagnosable. A build artifact only: transcripts change no scoring, target, baseline, or lint semantics.

outcome.description: The harness episode outcome (OQ-017c / SPEC 11.8): submit_result called, episode ended without submit, tool budget exceeded, or a provider/infra failure.

toolCall.description: One dispatched tool call in episode order; seq is the 1-based tool-call counter at that call. input/result are arbitrary JSON values (result is null for submit_result).
